data.body: PASS 1 review (T5c Security overlay): PASS — not-applicable. The plan authors eval-spec YAML + offline discipline tests for a git-backed library/CLI (rebar) with no new endpoint, network exposure, or authn/authz boundary. Model identifiers in specs are not secrets; live-run credentials live in the [eval] CI extra (see plan-review-finder.eval.yaml header), and the AC mandates zero-API-cost offline validation. The rebar domain itself has no access-level/auth concept (the existing FP1-T5c corpus case affirms this). No security finding.
